scripts.build: node scripts/generate-seo-pages.js && vite build && node scripts/gen-config.js
scripts.build:root: node scripts/generate-seo-pages.js && node -e "process.env.DEPLOY_BASE='/';require('child_process').execSync('npx vite build',{stdio:'inherit',env:process.env})" && node scripts/gen-config.js
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build:root && npx wrangler@latest pages deploy dist --project-name=monggeul --branch=main
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build:root && npx netlify-cli@latest deploy --dir=dist --prod
scripts._deploy_note: ★프론트(Pages)와 Supabase 엣지함수는 별도 배포다. deploy:cf 등은 프론트만 올린다. 엣지함수(openai-proxy 꿈해석·toss-* 결제·check_rate_limit 등)를 바꾸면 반드시 deploy:functions 도 같이 돌려야 프론트↔엣지 형식 드리프트(=라이브 500)를 막는다. deploy:all 권장.
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:cf && npm run deploy:functions && npm run smoke:live
scripts.cap:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
